steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $cert = Get-ChildItem Cert:\LocalMachine\Root | Where-Object { $_.Subject -like '*Zscaler*' -and $_.NotAfter -gt (Get-Date) }; if ($cert) { 'OK: Zscaler-Zertifikat gültig bis ' + $cert.NotAfter.ToString('dd.MM.yyyy') } else { 'FEHLER: Kein gültiges Zscaler-Zertifikat gefunden' } }

steps.label: Spooler-Status prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-Service -Name 'Spooler' | Select-Object Name, Status, StartType }

steps.label: Spooler neustarten...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Restart-Service -Name 'Spooler' -Force }

steps.label: Spooler-Status prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $svc = Get-Service -Name 'Spooler'; if ($svc.Status -eq 'Running') { 'OK: Druckdienst läuft' } else { 'FEHLER: Druckdienst nicht gestartet' } }

steps.label: Spooler stoppen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Stop-Service -Name 'Spooler' -Force }

steps.label: Druckwarteschlange leeren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Remove-Item 'C:\Windows\System32\spool\PRINTERS\*' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

steps.label: Spooler starten...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Start-Service -Name 'Spooler' }

steps.label: Spooler-Status prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $svc = Get-Service -Name 'Spooler'; $files = (Get-ChildItem 'C:\Windows\System32\spool\PRINTERS' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object).Count; if ($svc.Status -eq 'Running' -and $files -eq 0) { 'OK: Spooler läuft, Warteschlange leer' } else { 'FEHLER: Spooler-Status unklar' } }

steps.label: Installierte Drucker auflisten...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-Printer | Select-Object Name, DriverName, PortName, Shared }

steps.label: Spooler neustarten...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Restart-Service -Name 'Spooler' -Force }

steps.label: Netzwerkdrucker neu verbinden...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $netPrinters = Get-Printer | Where-Object { $_.PortName -like '*\\*' }; foreach ($p in $netPrinters) { $port = $p.PortName; Remove-Printer -Name $p.Name -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Add-Printer -ConnectionName $port -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }

steps.label: Drucker-Status prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $printers = Get-Printer; if ($printers) { 'OK: ' + $printers.Count + ' Drucker installiert' } else { 'WARNUNG: Keine Drucker gefunden' } }

steps.label: Druckaufträge prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-PrintJob -PrinterName * -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object PrinterName, DocumentName, JobStatus, Size }

steps.label: Alle Druckaufträge löschen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-Printer | ForEach-Object { Get-PrintJob -PrinterName $_.Name -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Remove-PrintJob -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }

steps.label: Spooler bereinigen und neustarten...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Stop-Service -Name 'Spooler' -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Remove-Item 'C:\Windows\System32\spool\PRINTERS\*' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Service -Name 'Spooler' }

steps.label: Warteschlange prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $jobs = Get-PrintJob -PrinterName * -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $svc = Get-Service -Name 'Spooler'; if ($svc.Status -eq 'Running' -and -not $jobs) { 'OK: Druckwarteschlange komplett geleert' } else { 'WARNUNG: Noch Aufträge in der Warteschlange' } }

steps.label: DNS-Konfiguration prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-DnsClientServerAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object { $_.ServerAddresses } | Select-Object InterfaceAlias, ServerAddresses }

steps.label: DNS-Cache leeren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { ipconfig /flushdns }

steps.label: DNS neu registrieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { ipconfig /registerdns }

steps.label: DNS-Auflösung testen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $result = Resolve-DnsName -Name 'google.com' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($result) { 'OK: DNS-Auflösung funktioniert' } else { 'FEHLER: DNS-Auflösung fehlgeschlagen' } }

steps.label: User benachrichtigen...
steps.message: IT-Wartung: Netzwerk wird komplett zurückgesetzt. Die Verbindung wird kurzzeitig unterbrochen.

steps.label: DNS-Cache leeren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { ipconfig /flushdns }

steps.label: Winsock zurücksetzen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { netsh winsock reset }

steps.label: TCP/IP zurücksetzen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { netsh int ip reset }

steps.label: ARP-Cache leeren und DHCP erneuern...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { arp -d *; ipconfig /release; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; ipconfig /renew }

steps.label: DNS neu registrieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { ipconfig /registerdns }

steps.label: Netzwerk-Konnektivität prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $ping = Test-Connection -ComputerName '8.8.8.8' -Count 1 -Quiet; $dns = Resolve-DnsName 'google.com' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($ping -and $dns) { 'OK: Netzwerk funktioniert (Ping + DNS)' } elseif ($ping) { 'WARNUNG: Ping OK aber DNS fehlgeschlagen' } else { 'FEHLER: Keine Netzwerkverbindung' } }

steps.label: WLAN-Profile auflisten...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { netsh wlan show profiles }

steps.label: Aktuelle WLAN-Verbindung prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { netsh wlan show interfaces }

steps.label: WLAN-Verbindung trennen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { netsh wlan disconnect }

steps.label: WLAN-Profil neu verbinden...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $profiles = netsh wlan show profiles | Select-String ':\s+(.+)$' | ForEach-Object { $_.Matches.Groups[1].Value.Trim() }; if ($profiles) { netsh wlan connect name="$($profiles[0])" } }

steps.label: WLAN-Verbindung prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $iface = netsh wlan show interfaces; if ($iface -match 'Verbunden|connected') { 'OK: WLAN verbunden' } else { 'WARNUNG: WLAN nicht verbunden' } }

steps.label: Netzwerkadapter prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-NetAdapter | Select-Object Name, InterfaceDescription, Status, LinkSpeed }

steps.label: Netzwerkadapter deaktivieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-NetAdapter | Where-Object { $_.Status -eq 'Up' -and $_.InterfaceDescription -notlike '*Hyper-V*' -and $_.InterfaceDescription -notlike '*Zscaler*' } | Disable-NetAdapter -Confirm:$false }

steps.label: Netzwerkadapter aktivieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-NetAdapter | Where-Object { $_.Status -eq 'Disabled' -and $_.InterfaceDescription -notlike '*Hyper-V*' } | Enable-NetAdapter -Confirm:$false }

steps.label: Adapter-Status prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $adapters = Get-NetAdapter | Where-Object { $_.Status -eq 'Up' }; if ($adapters) { 'OK: ' + $adapters.Count + ' Adapter aktiv' } else { 'FEHLER: Kein Adapter aktiv' } }

steps.label: Proxy-Einstellungen prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-ItemProperty 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Internet Settings' | Select-Object ProxyEnable, ProxyServer, ProxyOverride, AutoConfigURL }

steps.label: Proxy-Einstellungen entfernen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $path = 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Internet Settings'; Set-ItemProperty -Path $path -Name 'ProxyEnable' -Value 0 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-ItemProperty -Path $path -Name 'ProxyServer' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-ItemProperty -Path $path -Name 'ProxyOverride' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

steps.label: DNS-Cache leeren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { ipconfig /flushdns }

steps.label: Proxy-Status prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $proxy = Get-ItemProperty 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Internet Settings' -Name 'ProxyEnable' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($proxy.ProxyEnable -eq 0) { 'OK: Proxy deaktiviert' } else { 'WARNUNG: Proxy noch aktiv' } }

steps.label: User benachrichtigen...
steps.message: IT-Wartung: Systemdateiprüfung wird ausgeführt. Dies kann einige Minuten dauern.

steps.label: DISM RestoreHealth ausführen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { DISM /Online /Cleanup-Image /RestoreHealth }

steps.label: SFC Scan ausführen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { sfc /scannow }

steps.label: Ergebnis prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $cbsLog = Get-Content 'C:\Windows\Logs\CBS\CBS.log' -Tail 20 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $violations = $cbsLog | Select-String 'Verification 100%|no integrity violations'; if ($violations) { 'OK: Systemdateiprüfung abgeschlossen - keine Fehler' } else { 'WARNUNG: Prüfung abgeschlossen - Log überprüfen' } }

steps.label: Update-Dienste stoppen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Stop-Service -Name 'wuauserv','cryptSvc','bits','msiserver' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

steps.label: Update-Cache löschen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Rename-Item 'C:\Windows\SoftwareDistribution' 'C:\Windows\SoftwareDistribution.bak' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Rename-Item 'C:\Windows\System32\catroot2' 'C:\Windows\System32\catroot2.bak' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

steps.label: Update-Dienste starten...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Start-Service -Name 'wuauserv','cryptSvc','bits','msiserver' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

steps.label: Update-Dienste prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $svc = Get-Service -Name 'wuauserv'; if ($svc.Status -eq 'Running') { 'OK: Windows Update-Dienst läuft, Cache zurückgesetzt' } else { 'FEHLER: Windows Update-Dienst nicht gestartet' } }

steps.label: Explorer beenden...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-Process -Name 'explorer' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force }

steps.label: Explorer starten...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Start-Process 'explorer.exe' }

steps.label: Explorer-Status prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $proc = Get-Process -Name 'explorer' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($proc) { 'OK: Explorer läuft wieder' } else { 'FEHLER: Explorer nicht gestartet' } }

steps.label: Explorer beenden...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-Process -Name 'explorer' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force }

steps.label: Icon Cache löschen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $users = Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users' -Directory -Exclude 'Public','Default*'; foreach ($u in $users) { Remove-Item "$($u.FullName)\AppData\Local\IconCache.db" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item "$($u.FullName)\AppData\Local\Microsoft\Windows\Explorer\iconcache*" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item "$($u.FullName)\AppData\Local\Microsoft\Windows\Explorer\thumbcache*" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }

steps.label: Explorer starten...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Start-Process 'explorer.exe' }

steps.label: Explorer-Status prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $proc = Get-Process -Name 'explorer' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($proc) { 'OK: Icon Cache zurückgesetzt, Explorer läuft' } else { 'FEHLER: Explorer nicht gestartet' } }

steps.label: Windows Search stoppen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Stop-Service -Name 'WSearch' -Force }

steps.label: Such-Index löschen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Remove-Item 'C:\ProgramData\Microsoft\Search\Data\Applications\Windows\Windows.edb' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item 'C:\ProgramData\Microsoft\Search\Data\Applications\Windows\*.log' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

steps.label: Windows Search starten...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Start-Service -Name 'WSearch' }

steps.label: Such-Dienst prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $svc = Get-Service -Name 'WSearch'; if ($svc.Status -eq 'Running') { 'OK: Windows Search läuft, Index wird neu aufgebaut' } else { 'FEHLER: Windows Search nicht gestartet' } }

steps.label: Temp-Dateien zählen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $winTemp = (Get-ChildItem 'C:\Windows\Temp' -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum); $userTemp = 0; Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users' -Directory -Exclude 'Public','Default*' | ForEach-Object { $userTemp += (Get-ChildItem "$($_.FullName)\AppData\Local\Temp" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum).Sum }; "Windows Temp: $([math]::Round($winTemp.Sum/1MB,1)) MB, User Temp: $([math]::Round($userTemp/1MB,1)) MB" }

steps.label: Temp-Verzeichnisse bereinigen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Remove-Item 'C:\Windows\Temp\*' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $users = Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users' -Directory -Exclude 'Public','Default*'; foreach ($u in $users) { Remove-Item "$($u.FullName)\AppData\Local\Temp\*" -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }

steps.label: DNS-Cache und Thumbnails bereinigen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { ipconfig /flushdns; $users = Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users' -Directory -Exclude 'Public','Default*'; foreach ($u in $users) { Remove-Item "$($u.FullName)\AppData\Local\Microsoft\Windows\Explorer\thumbcache*" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }

steps.label: Bereinigung prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $winTemp = (Get-ChildItem 'C:\Windows\Temp' -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum).Sum; if ($winTemp -lt 10MB) { 'OK: Temp-Dateien bereinigt' } else { 'WARNUNG: Einige Temp-Dateien konnten nicht gelöscht werden' } }

steps.label: Autostart-Einträge auflisten...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-CimInstance -ClassName Win32_StartupCommand | Select-Object Name, Command, Location, User }

steps.label: Registrierungs-Autostart prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $paths = @('HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run','HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\RunOnce'); foreach ($p in $paths) { Get-ItemProperty $p -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object * -ExcludeProperty PS* } }

steps.label: Schwere Autostart-Programme deaktivieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $heavyApps = @('iTunesHelper','Spotify','Steam','Discord','AdobeAAMUpdater','AdobeGCInvoker'); $tasks = Get-ScheduledTask | Where-Object { $_.TaskName -in $heavyApps -and $_.State -eq 'Ready' }; $tasks | Disable-ScheduledTask -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; 'Deaktiviert: ' + ($tasks.TaskName -join ', ') }

steps.label: Autostart-Status prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $count = (Get-CimInstance -ClassName Win32_StartupCommand | Measure-Object).Count; 'OK: ' + $count + ' Autostart-Einträge aktiv' }

steps.label: User benachrichtigen...
steps.message: IT-Wartung: Komplette Systemwartung wird durchgeführt. Dies kann 10-15 Minuten dauern.

steps.label: Temp-Dateien bereinigen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Remove-Item 'C:\Windows\Temp\*' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $users = Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users' -Directory -Exclude 'Public','Default*'; foreach ($u in $users) { Remove-Item "$($u.FullName)\AppData\Local\Temp\*" -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; ipconfig /flushdns }

steps.label: Windows Update-Check...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { if (Get-Module -ListAvailable -Name PSWindowsUpdate) { Install-WindowsUpdate -AcceptAll -AutoReboot:$false -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } else { Start-Process 'UsoClient.exe' -ArgumentList 'ScanInstallWait' -Wait -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }

steps.label: SFC Scan...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { sfc /scannow }

steps.label: Festplatte optimieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $disk = Get-PhysicalDisk | Select-Object -First 1; if ($disk.MediaType -eq 'SSD') { Optimize-Volume -DriveLetter C -ReTrim -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; 'SSD TRIM ausgeführt' } else { Optimize-Volume -DriveLetter C -Defrag -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; 'HDD Defragmentierung ausgeführt' } }

steps.label: Wartung prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $freeSpace = [math]::Round((Get-PSDrive C).Free/1GB,1); 'OK: Wartung abgeschlossen, freier Speicher: ' + $freeSpace + ' GB' }

steps.label: Top CPU-Prozesse prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-Process | Sort-Object CPU -Descending | Select-Object -First 10 Name, Id, CPU, @{N='MemMB';E={[math]::Round($_.WorkingSet64/1MB,1)}} }

steps.label: Ressourcenfresser beenden...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $protected = @('System','smss','csrss','wininit','services','lsass','svchost','explorer','dwm','winlogon'); Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.CPU -gt 300 -and $_.Name -notin $protected } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

steps.label: Temp-Dateien bereinigen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Remove-Item 'C:\Windows\Temp\*' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $users = Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users' -Directory -Exclude 'Public','Default*'; foreach ($u in $users) { Remove-Item "$($u.FullName)\AppData\Local\Temp\*" -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }

steps.label: Energieplan auf Höchstleistung setzen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { powercfg /setactive 8c5e7fda-e8bf-4a96-9a85-a6e23a8c635c }

steps.label: Performance prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $cpu = (Get-CimInstance Win32_Processor).LoadPercentage; $mem = [math]::Round((Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem).FreePhysicalMemory/1MB,1); 'OK: CPU-Auslastung: ' + $cpu + '%, Freier RAM: ' + $mem + ' GB' }

steps.label: Datenträgerauslastung prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-Counter '\PhysicalDisk(_Total)\% Disk Time' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $_.CounterSamples | Select-Object Path, CookedValue } }

steps.label: Superfetch/SysMain deaktivieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Stop-Service -Name 'SysMain' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Set-Service -Name 'SysMain' -StartupType Disabled -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

steps.label: Windows Search-Indexierung pausieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Stop-Service -Name 'WSearch' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

steps.label: Connected User Experiences deaktivieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Stop-Service -Name 'DiagTrack' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Set-Service -Name 'DiagTrack' -StartupType Disabled -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

steps.label: Datenträgerauslastung prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $disk = Get-Counter '\PhysicalDisk(_Total)\% Disk Time' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $val = [math]::Round($disk.CounterSamples[0].CookedValue,0); if ($val -lt 80) { 'OK: Datenträgerauslastung: ' + $val + '%' } else { 'WARNUNG: Datenträgerauslastung noch bei ' + $val + '%' } }

steps.label: RAM-Nutzung prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $os = Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem; $total = [math]::Round($os.TotalVisibleMemorySize/1MB,1); $free = [math]::Round($os.FreePhysicalMemory/1MB,1); $used = $total - $free; "RAM: $used / $total GB belegt ($([math]::Round(($used/$total)*100,0))%)"; Get-Process | Sort-Object WorkingSet64 -Descending | Select-Object -First 10 Name, @{N='MemMB';E={[math]::Round($_.WorkingSet64/1MB,0)}} }

steps.label: Speicherfressende Prozesse beenden...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $protected = @('System','smss','csrss','wininit','services','lsass','svchost','explorer','dwm','winlogon','OUTLOOK','ms-teams','Teams'); Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.WorkingSet64 -gt 500MB -and $_.Name -notin $protected } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

steps.label: Standby-Liste leeren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { [System.GC]::Collect(); [System.GC]::WaitForPendingFinalizers() }

steps.label: RAM-Status prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $os = Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem; $free = [math]::Round($os.FreePhysicalMemory/1MB,1); $pct = [math]::Round(($os.FreePhysicalMemory/$os.TotalVisibleMemorySize)*100,0); if ($pct -gt 20) { 'OK: Freier RAM: ' + $free + ' GB (' + $pct + '%)' } else { 'WARNUNG: Wenig freier RAM: ' + $free + ' GB (' + $pct + '%)' } }

steps.label: Boot-Zeit prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $boot = Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem; $uptime = (Get-Date) - $boot.LastBootUpTime; "Letzer Boot: $($boot.LastBootUpTime), Uptime: $([math]::Round($uptime.TotalHours,1)) Stunden"; Get-CimInstance -ClassName Win32_StartupCommand | Select-Object Name, Command }

steps.label: Schwere Autostart-Programme deaktivieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $heavyApps = @('iTunesHelper','Spotify','Steam','Discord','AdobeAAMUpdater','AdobeGCInvoker','OneDrive','Skype'); foreach ($app in $heavyApps) { $regPaths = @('HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run','HKCU:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run'); foreach ($rp in $regPaths) { $val = Get-ItemProperty $rp -Name $app -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($val) { Remove-ItemProperty $rp -Name $app -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } } }

steps.label: Temp-Dateien bereinigen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Remove-Item 'C:\Windows\Temp\*' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item 'C:\Windows\Prefetch\*' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

steps.label: Schnellstart aktivieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { powercfg /hibernate on; Set-ItemProperty 'HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Session Manager\Power' -Name 'HiberbootEnabled' -Value 1 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

steps.label: Boot-Optimierung prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $startupCount = (Get-CimInstance -ClassName Win32_StartupCommand | Measure-Object).Count; 'OK: Boot-Optimierung abgeschlossen, ' + $startupCount + ' Autostart-Einträge verbleiben' }

steps.label: User benachrichtigen...
steps.message: IT-Wartung: Komplette Performance-Optimierung wird durchgeführt. Dies kann einige Minuten dauern.

steps.label: Ressourcenfresser beenden...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $protected = @('System','smss','csrss','wininit','services','lsass','svchost','explorer','dwm','winlogon','OUTLOOK','ms-teams','Teams'); Get-Process | Where-Object { ($_.CPU -gt 300 -or $_.WorkingSet64 -gt 500MB) -and $_.Name -notin $protected } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

steps.label: Temp und Cache bereinigen...

steps.label: Office-Credentials bereinigen...

steps.label: OneDrive-Sync prüfen...

steps.label: SAP-Cache prüfen...

steps.label: SAP-Verbindung testen...

steps.label: Benutzer-Kontostatus prüfen...
