steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { w32tm /resync /force }

steps.label: Zeitsync prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $source = w32tm /query /source 2>&1; if ($source -and $source -notmatch 'error|Fehler') { 'OK: Zeitsynchronisation aktiv - Quelle: ' + $source.Trim() } else { 'WARNUNG: Zeitsynchronisation prüfen' } }

steps.label: Proxy-Einstellungen prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { netsh winhttp show proxy; Get-ItemProperty 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Internet Settings' | Select-Object ProxyEnable, ProxyServer, AutoConfigURL }

steps.label: Proxy zurücksetzen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { netsh winhttp reset proxy; $path = 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Internet Settings'; Set-ItemProperty -Path $path -Name 'ProxyEnable' -Value 0 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-ItemProperty -Path $path -Name 'ProxyServer' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

steps.label: DNS-Cache leeren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { ipconfig /flushdns }

steps.label: Proxy-Status prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $proxy = Get-ItemProperty 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Internet Settings' -Name 'ProxyEnable' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($proxy.ProxyEnable -eq 0) { 'OK: Proxy deaktiviert' } else { 'WARNUNG: Proxy noch aktiv' } }

steps.label: RDP-Status prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-ItemProperty 'HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Terminal Server' -Name 'fDenyTSConnections' | Select-Object fDenyTSConnections }

steps.label: RDP aktivieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Set-ItemProperty 'HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Terminal Server' -Name 'fDenyTSConnections' -Value 0 }

steps.label: Firewall-Regel hinzufügen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Enable-NetFirewallRule -DisplayGroup 'Remotedesktop' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Enable-NetFirewallRule -DisplayGroup 'Remote Desktop' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

steps.label: RDP-Status prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $rdp = Get-ItemProperty 'HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Terminal Server' -Name 'fDenyTSConnections'; if ($rdp.fDenyTSConnections -eq 0) { 'OK: RDP aktiviert' } else { 'FEHLER: RDP konnte nicht aktiviert werden' } }

steps.label: Firewall-Status prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-NetFirewallProfile | Select-Object Name, Enabled }

steps.label: User benachrichtigen...
steps.message: IT-Wartung: Die Windows-Firewall wird auf Standardwerte zurückgesetzt.

steps.label: Firewall auf Standard zurücksetzen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { netsh advfirewall reset }

steps.label: Firewall-Status prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $profiles = Get-NetFirewallProfile; $allEnabled = ($profiles | Where-Object { $_.Enabled -eq $true } | Measure-Object).Count; if ($allEnabled -eq 3) { 'OK: Alle Firewall-Profile aktiv (Standard)' } else { 'WARNUNG: Nicht alle Profile aktiv' } }

steps.label: Defender-Status prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-MpComputerStatus | Select-Object AntivirusEnabled, RealTimeProtectionEnabled, AntivirusSignatureLastUpdated, QuickScanEndTime }

steps.label: Defender-Signaturen aktualisieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Update-MpSignature -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

steps.label: Quick Scan starten...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Start-MpScan -ScanType QuickScan -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

steps.label: Scan-Ergebnis prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $status = Get-MpComputerStatus; $threats = Get-MpThreatDetection -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($status.AntivirusEnabled -and -not $threats) { 'OK: Defender aktiv, keine Bedrohungen gefunden' } elseif ($threats) { 'WARNUNG: ' + ($threats | Measure-Object).Count + ' Bedrohung(en) gefunden' } else { 'FEHLER: Defender nicht aktiv' } }

steps.label: Speicherplatz prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-PSDrive C | Select-Object @{N='UsedGB';E={[math]::Round($_.Used/1GB,1)}}, @{N='FreeGB';E={[math]::Round($_.Free/1GB,1)}}, @{N='TotalGB';E={[math]::Round(($_.Used+$_.Free)/1GB,1)}} }

steps.label: Temp-Dateien bereinigen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Remove-Item 'C:\Windows\Temp\*' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $users = Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users' -Directory -Exclude 'Public','Default*'; foreach ($u in $users) { Remove-Item "$($u.FullName)\AppData\Local\Temp\*" -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }

steps.label: Papierkorb und Thumbnails leeren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Clear-RecycleBin -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $users = Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users' -Directory -Exclude 'Public','Default*'; foreach ($u in $users) { Remove-Item "$($u.FullName)\AppData\Local\Microsoft\Windows\Explorer\thumbcache*" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }

steps.label: Alte Downloads bereinigen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $users = Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users' -Directory -Exclude 'Public','Default*'; foreach ($u in $users) { Get-ChildItem "$($u.FullName)\Downloads" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LastWriteTime -lt (Get-Date).AddDays(-90) -and -not $_.PSIsContainer } | Remove-Item -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }

steps.label: Speicherplatz prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $free = [math]::Round((Get-PSDrive C).Free/1GB,1); 'OK: Bereinigung abgeschlossen, freier Speicher: ' + $free + ' GB' }

steps.label: WinSxS-Größe prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { DISM /Online /Cleanup-Image /AnalyzeComponentStore }

steps.label: User benachrichtigen...
steps.message: IT-Wartung: Windows-Komponentenspeicher wird bereinigt. Dies kann einige Minuten dauern.

steps.label: WinSxS bereinigen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { DISM /Online /Cleanup-Image /StartComponentCleanup /ResetBase }

steps.label: Bereinigung prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $free = [math]::Round((Get-PSDrive C).Free/1GB,1); 'OK: WinSxS Bereinigung abgeschlossen, freier Speicher: ' + $free + ' GB' }

steps.label: SMART-Status prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-PhysicalDisk | Select-Object FriendlyName, MediaType, HealthStatus, OperationalStatus, Size, @{N='SizeGB';E={[math]::Round($_.Size/1GB,1)}} }

steps.label: Disk-Fehler prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-PhysicalDisk | Get-StorageReliabilityCounter -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object DeviceId, ReadErrorsTotal, WriteErrorsTotal, Temperature, Wear }

steps.label: Volume-Reparatur ausführen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Repair-Volume -DriveLetter C -Scan -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

steps.label: Disk-Gesundheit prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $disks = Get-PhysicalDisk; $healthy = $disks | Where-Object { $_.HealthStatus -eq 'Healthy' }; if ($healthy.Count -eq $disks.Count) { 'OK: Alle Datenträger gesund (' + $disks.Count + ' Disk(s))' } else { 'WARNUNG: ' + ($disks.Count - $healthy.Count) + ' Datenträger mit Problemen' } }

steps.label: SSD-Status prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-PhysicalDisk | Where-Object { $_.MediaType -eq 'SSD' } | Select-Object FriendlyName, HealthStatus, @{N='SizeGB';E={[math]::Round($_.Size/1GB,1)}}; Get-PhysicalDisk | Get-StorageReliabilityCounter -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object DeviceId, Wear, Temperature }

steps.label: TRIM ausführen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Optimize-Volume -DriveLetter C -ReTrim -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

steps.label: Defragmentierung für SSD deaktivieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $task = Get-ScheduledTask -TaskName 'ScheduledDefrag' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($task) { 'Defrag Task Status: ' + $task.State } }

steps.label: Partition-Alignment prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-Partition -DriveLetter C | Select-Object DriveLetter, Offset, Size, @{N='AlignedKB';E={$_.Offset/1024}} }

steps.label: SSD-Optimierung prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $ssd = Get-PhysicalDisk | Where-Object { $_.MediaType -eq 'SSD' }; if ($ssd -and $ssd.HealthStatus -eq 'Healthy') { 'OK: SSD optimiert und gesund' } elseif (-not $ssd) { 'INFO: Keine SSD gefunden (HDD-System)' } else { 'WARNUNG: SSD-Gesundheit prüfen' } }

steps.label: Aktuelle hosts-Datei prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-Content 'C:\Windows\System32\drivers\etc\hosts' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

steps.label: hosts-Datei sichern...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Copy-Item 'C:\Windows\System32\drivers\etc\hosts' "C:\Windows\System32\drivers\etc\hosts.bak.$(Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd_HHmmss')" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

steps.label: hosts-Datei zurücksetzen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $defaultHosts = @('# Copyright (c) 1993-2009 Microsoft Corp.','#','# This is a sample HOSTS file used by Microsoft TCP/IP for Windows.','#','# 127.0.0.1       localhost','# ::1             localhost'); $defaultHosts | Set-Content 'C:\Windows\System32\drivers\etc\hosts' -Force }

steps.label: DNS-Cache leeren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { ipconfig /flushdns }

steps.label: hosts-Datei prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $lines = Get-Content 'C:\Windows\System32\drivers\etc\hosts' | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch '^#' -and $_.Trim() -ne '' }; if (-not $lines) { 'OK: hosts-Datei auf Standard zurückgesetzt' } else { 'WARNUNG: hosts-Datei enthält noch benutzerdefinierte Einträge' } }

steps.label: Aktuelle Berechtigungen prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $user = (Get-CimInstance Win32_ComputerSystem).UserName; $profilePath = "C:\Users\$($user.Split('\')[-1])"; Get-Acl $profilePath -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Owner, @{N='Access';E={$_.Access | Select-Object IdentityReference, FileSystemRights, AccessControlType}} }

steps.label: Ownership übernehmen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $user = (Get-CimInstance Win32_ComputerSystem).UserName; $profilePath = "C:\Users\$($user.Split('\')[-1])"; takeown /f $profilePath /r /d y 2>$null }

steps.label: ACL zurücksetzen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $user = (Get-CimInstance Win32_ComputerSystem).UserName; $profilePath = "C:\Users\$($user.Split('\')[-1])"; icacls $profilePath /reset /t /c /q 2>$null; icacls $profilePath /grant "$user`:(OI)(CI)F" /t /c /q 2>$null }

steps.label: Berechtigungen prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $user = (Get-CimInstance Win32_ComputerSystem).UserName; $profilePath = "C:\Users\$($user.Split('\')[-1])"; $acl = Get-Acl $profilePath -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($acl) { 'OK: Berechtigungen zurückgesetzt für ' + $profilePath } else { 'FEHLER: Berechtigungen konnten nicht geprüft werden' } }

steps.label: Temporäre Profile suchen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-ChildItem 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\ProfileList' | ForEach-Object { $props = Get-ItemProperty $_.PSPath; [PSCustomObject]@{ SID = $_.PSChildName; ProfilePath = $props.ProfileImagePath; State = $props.State; RefCount = $props.RefCount; IsBak = $_.PSChildName.EndsWith('.bak') } } | Where-Object { $_.IsBak -or $_.ProfilePath -like '*TEMP*' } }

steps.label: .bak Registrierungsschlüssel umbenennen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $profileList = 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\ProfileList'; $bakKeys = Get-ChildItem $profileList | Where-Object { $_.PSChildName.EndsWith('.bak') }; foreach ($bak in $bakKeys) { $originalSid = $bak.PSChildName -replace '\.bak$',''; $originalPath = Join-Path $profileList $originalSid; if (Test-Path $originalPath) { Rename-Item $originalPath "$originalSid.tmp" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Rename-Item $bak.PSPath $originalSid -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if (Test-Path (Join-Path $profileList "$originalSid.tmp")) { Remove-Item (Join-Path $profileList "$originalSid.tmp") -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } }

steps.label: User benachrichtigen...
steps.message: IT-Wartung: Temporäres Profil wurde repariert. Bitte starten Sie den PC neu, um sich mit Ihrem normalen Profil anzumelden.

steps.label: Profil-Status prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $bakKeys = Get-ChildItem 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\ProfileList' | Where-Object { $_.PSChildName.EndsWith('.bak') }; if (-not $bakKeys) { 'OK: Keine .bak Profile mehr vorhanden - Neustart erforderlich' } else { 'WARNUNG: Noch .bak Profile vorhanden' } }

steps.label: Benutzerprofile analysieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users' -Directory -Exclude 'Public','Default*' | ForEach-Object { $size = (Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum).Sum; [PSCustomObject]@{ Name = $_.Name; SizeMB = [math]::Round($size/1MB,0); LastAccess = $_.LastAccessTime } } | Sort-Object SizeMB -Descending }

steps.label: Temp-Dateien in Profilen bereinigen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $users = Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users' -Directory -Exclude 'Public','Default*'; foreach ($u in $users) { Remove-Item "$($u.FullName)\AppData\Local\Temp\*" -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item "$($u.FullName)\AppData\Local\Microsoft\Windows\Explorer\thumbcache*" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item "$($u.FullName)\AppData\Local\CrashDumps\*" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }

steps.label: Browser-Cache in Profilen bereinigen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $users = Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users' -Directory -Exclude 'Public','Default*'; foreach ($u in $users) { Remove-Item "$($u.FullName)\AppData\Local\Google\Chrome\User Data\Default\Cache\*" -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item "$($u.FullName)\AppData\Local\Microsoft\Edge\User Data\Default\Cache\*" -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }

steps.label: Profil-Bereinigung prüfen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $totalFreed = 0; $users = Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users' -Directory -Exclude 'Public','Default*'; $free = [math]::Round((Get-PSDrive C).Free/1GB,1); 'OK: Profile bereinigt, freier Speicher: ' + $free + ' GB' }

steps.label: Aktuelle Spracheinstellungen pruefen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-WinUILanguageOverride; Get-WinUserLanguageList | Select-Object LanguageTag; Get-Culture | Select-Object Name }

steps.label: Deutsches Sprachpaket installieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Install-Language de-DE -CopyToSettings -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

steps.label: UI-Sprache auf Deutsch setzen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Set-WinUILanguageOverride -Language 'de-DE' }

steps.label: Tastaturlayout auf QWERTZ setzen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $langList = New-WinUserLanguageList de-DE; Set-WinUserLanguageList $langList -Force }

steps.label: Region und Kultur setzen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Set-WinHomeLocation -GeoId 94; Set-Culture de-DE; Set-WinSystemLocale de-DE }

steps.label: Office Sprache auf Deutsch setzen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Set-ItemProperty -Path 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Office\16.0\Common\LanguageResources' -Name UILanguage -Value 1031 -Type DWord -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Set-ItemProperty -Path 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Office\16.0\Common\LanguageResources' -Name HelpLanguage -Value 1031 -Type DWord -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

steps.label: Benutzer informieren...
steps.message: IT-Wartung: Die Spracheinstellungen wurden auf Deutsch zurueckgesetzt. Bitte melden Sie sich ab und wieder an, damit alle Aenderungen wirksam werden.

steps.label: Spracheinstellungen verifizieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $ui = Get-WinUILanguageOverride; $culture = Get-Culture; if($ui -match 'de-DE' -or $culture.Name -eq 'de-DE') { 'OK: Sprache auf Deutsch gesetzt (Neuanmeldung erforderlich)' } else { 'WARNUNG: Spracheinstellung konnte nicht verifiziert werden' } }

steps.label: Aktuelle Dateizuordnungen pruefen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { foreach ($ext in @('.pdf','.html','.htm','.mailto')) { $uc = Get-ItemProperty "HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\FileExts\$ext\UserChoice" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [PSCustomObject]@{Extension=$ext; Handler=$uc.ProgId} } }

steps.label: SetUserFTA Tool bereitstellen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { if(!(Test-Path 'C:\Tools\SetUserFTA.exe')) { New-Item -Path 'C:\Tools' -ItemType Directory -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Copy-Item '\\fileserver\Tools$\SetUserFTA.exe' 'C:\Tools\SetUserFTA.exe' -Force } }

steps.label: PDF-Zuordnung auf Adobe setzen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { & 'C:\Tools\SetUserFTA.exe' .pdf AcroExch.Document.DC }

steps.label: HTML/HTTP-Zuordnung auf Chrome setzen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { & 'C:\Tools\SetUserFTA.exe' .html ChromeHTML; & 'C:\Tools\SetUserFTA.exe' .htm ChromeHTML; & 'C:\Tools\SetUserFTA.exe' http ChromeHTML; & 'C:\Tools\SetUserFTA.exe' https ChromeHTML }

steps.label: mailto-Zuordnung auf Outlook setzen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { & 'C:\Tools\SetUserFTA.exe' mailto Outlook.URL.mailto }

steps.label: Dateizuordnungen verifizieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $ok = $true; foreach ($ext in @('.pdf','.html')) { $uc = Get-ItemProperty "HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\FileExts\$ext\UserChoice" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if($uc.ProgId -match 'MSEdge|AppX') { $ok = $false } }; if($ok) { 'OK: Standard-Apps erfolgreich gesetzt' } else { 'WARNUNG: Einige Zuordnungen noch auf Edge/Standard-Apps' } }

steps.label: Systemdatum pruefen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $diff = [math]::Abs(((Get-Date) - (Invoke-RestMethod 'http://worldtimeapi.org/api/timezone/Europe/Berlin' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).datetime).TotalSeconds); if($diff -gt 120) { 'WARNUNG: Systemzeit weicht um ' + $diff + ' Sekunden ab' } else { 'Systemzeit OK' }; Get-Date }

steps.label: Abgelaufene Zertifikate suchen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-ChildItem Cert:\LocalMachine\Root, Cert:\LocalMachine\My -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.NotAfter -lt (Get-Date) } | Select-Object Subject, NotAfter, Thumbprint }

steps.label: Zscaler Root CA pruefen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $zscaler = Get-ChildItem Cert:\LocalMachine\Root | Where-Object { $_.Subject -like '*Zscaler*' }; if($zscaler) { 'Zscaler CA vorhanden: ' + $zscaler.Subject + ' gueltig bis ' + $zscaler.NotAfter } else { 'WARNUNG: Zscaler Root CA fehlt' } }

steps.label: Fehlende Root-CAs importieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $certs = Get-ChildItem '\\fileserver\Certificates$\RootCA' -Filter '*.cer' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; foreach($cert in $certs) { Import-Certificate -FilePath $cert.FullName -CertStoreLocation Cert:\LocalMachine\Root -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }

steps.label: CRL-Cache leeren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { certutil -urlcache * delete 2>$null; certutil -setreg chain\ChainCacheResyncFiletime @now 2>$null }

steps.label: Zertifikate verifizieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $expired = Get-ChildItem Cert:\LocalMachine\Root | Where-Object { $_.NotAfter -lt (Get-Date) } | Measure-Object; $zscaler = Get-ChildItem Cert:\LocalMachine\Root | Where-Object { $_.Subject -like '*Zscaler*' }; if($expired.Count -eq 0 -and $zscaler) { 'OK: Keine abgelaufenen Root-CAs, Zscaler CA vorhanden' } else { 'WARNUNG: ' + $expired.Count + ' abgelaufene Zertifikate, Zscaler: ' + [bool]$zscaler } }

steps.label: MAC-Adresse ermitteln...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-NetAdapter | Where-Object { $_.Status -eq 'Up' } | Select-Object Name, MacAddress, LinkSpeed } -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if(!$?) { $arp = arp -a | Select-String '{hostname}'; if($arp) { $arp } else { try { (Get-ADComputer '{hostname}' -Properties * -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).IPv4Address } catch { 'PC nicht erreichbar - versuche ARP/AD' } } }

steps.label: Magic Packet senden...
steps.command: $mac = '{mac}'; $macBytes = $mac -replace '[:-]','' -split '(.{2})' | Where-Object { $_ } | ForEach-Object { [byte]('0x' + $_) }; $packet = [byte[]](,0xFF * 6) + ($macBytes * 16); $udpClient = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.UdpClient; $udpClient.Connect([System.Net.IPAddress]::Broadcast, 9); $udpClient.Send($packet, $packet.Length) | Out-Null; $udpClient.Close(); 'Magic Packet gesendet an MAC: ' + $mac

steps.label: PC-Erreichbarkeit pruefen...
steps.command: $result = Test-Connection '{hostname}' -Count 3 -Quiet; if($result) { 'OK: PC {hostname} ist erreichbar' } else { 'WARNUNG: PC {hostname} antwortet noch nicht - ggf. laengere Bootzeit' }

steps.label: Windows Defender Status...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-MpComputerStatus | Select-Object AntivirusEnabled, RealTimeProtectionEnabled, AntivirusSignatureLastUpdated, QuickScanEndTime, AMServiceEnabled }

steps.label: Firewall Status...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-NetFirewallProfile | Select-Object Name, Enabled, DefaultInboundAction, DefaultOutboundAction | Format-Table }

steps.label: BitLocker Status...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-BitLockerVolume -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object MountPoint, VolumeStatus, ProtectionStatus, EncryptionPercentage, KeyProtector }

steps.label: Windows Update Status...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-HotFix | Sort-Object InstalledOn -Descending | Select-Object -First 5 HotFixID, InstalledOn; $pending = Test-Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\WindowsUpdate\Auto Update\RebootRequired'; 'Updates pending: ' + $pending }

steps.label: ASR-Regeln und SMB1...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $asr = (Get-MpPreference).AttackSurfaceReductionRules_Actions; $smb1 = (Get-SmbServerConfiguration).EnableSMB1Protocol; [PSCustomObject]@{ASR_Rules_Count=$asr.Count; SMB1_Enabled=$smb1} }

steps.label: TPM und Autostart...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $tpm = Get-Tpm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object TpmPresent, TpmReady; $autostart = Get-CimInstance Win32_StartupCommand | Select-Object Name, Command; [PSCustomObject]@{TPM=$tpm; Autostart_Count=$autostart.Count}; $autostart | Format-Table }

steps.label: Offene Ports pruefen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess, @{N='Process';E={(Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).Name}} | Sort-Object LocalPort | Format-Table }

steps.label: Sicherheitsbericht erstellen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $issues = @(); $mp = Get-MpComputerStatus; if(!$mp.RealTimeProtectionEnabled) { $issues += 'Defender Echtzeitschutz deaktiviert' }; $fw = Get-NetFirewallProfile | Where-Object { !$_.Enabled }; if($fw) { $issues += 'Firewall-Profil deaktiviert' }; $bl = Get-BitLockerVolume -MountPoint C: -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if($bl.ProtectionStatus -ne 'On') { $issues += 'BitLocker nicht aktiv' }; $smb1 = (Get-SmbServerConfiguration).EnableSMB1Protocol; if($smb1) { $issues += 'SMB1 aktiviert' }; if($issues.Count -eq 0) { 'OK: Sicherheitsaudit bestanden - keine Probleme gefunden' } else { 'WARNUNG: ' + $issues.Count + ' Sicherheitsprobleme: ' + ($issues -join '; ') } }

steps.label: SMB-Konfiguration pruefen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-SmbServerConfiguration | Select-Object EnableSMB1Protocol, RequireSecuritySignature, EnableSecuritySignature, EncryptData, RejectUnencryptedAccess }

steps.label: SMB1 deaktivieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Set-SmbServerConfiguration -EnableSMB1Protocol $false -Force; Disable-WindowsOptionalFeature -Online -FeatureName SMB1Protocol -NoRestart -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

steps.label: SMB-Signierung erzwingen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Set-SmbServerConfiguration -RequireSecuritySignature $true -EnableSecuritySignature $true -Force }

steps.label: SMB-Verschluesselung aktivieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Set-SmbServerConfiguration -EncryptData $true -Force }

steps.label: SMB-Haertung verifizieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $cfg = Get-SmbServerConfiguration; if(!$cfg.EnableSMB1Protocol -and $cfg.RequireSecuritySignature -and $cfg.EncryptData) { 'OK: SMB gehaertet - SMB1 deaktiviert, Signierung und Verschluesselung aktiv' } else { 'WARNUNG: SMB-Haertung unvollstaendig - SMB1:' + $cfg.EnableSMB1Protocol + ' Signing:' + $cfg.RequireSecuritySignature + ' Encrypt:' + $cfg.EncryptData } }

steps.label: Aktuelle Datenschutz-Einstellungen pruefen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $telemetry = (Get-ItemProperty 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\DataCollection' -Name AllowTelemetry -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).AllowTelemetry; $adId = (Get-ItemProperty 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\AdvertisingInfo' -Name Enabled -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).Enabled; [PSCustomObject]@{Telemetry=$telemetry; AdvertisingID=$adId} }

steps.label: Telemetrie auf Minimum setzen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { New-Item -Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\DataCollection' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Out-Null; Set-ItemProperty -Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\DataCollection' -Name AllowTelemetry -Value 0 -Type DWord -Force }

steps.label: Werbe-ID deaktivieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Set-ItemProperty -Path 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\AdvertisingInfo' -Name Enabled -Value 0 -Type DWord -Force }

steps.label: Aktivitaetsverlauf deaktivieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { New-Item -Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\System' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Out-Null; Set-ItemProperty -Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\System' -Name EnableActivityFeed -Value 0 -Type DWord -Force; Set-ItemProperty -Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\System' -Name PublishUserActivities -Value 0 -Type DWord -Force }

steps.label: Hintergrund-Apps deaktivieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Set-ItemProperty -Path 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\BackgroundAccessApplications' -Name GlobalUserDisabled -Value 1 -Type DWord -Force }

steps.label: Standort-Dienst deaktivieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Set-ItemProperty -Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\CapabilityAccessManager\ConsentStore\location' -Name Value -Value 'Deny' -Force }

steps.label: DiagTrack-Dienst deaktivieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Stop-Service DiagTrack -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Set-Service DiagTrack -StartupType Disabled }

steps.label: Datenschutz-Einstellungen verifizieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $telemetry = (Get-ItemProperty 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\DataCollection' -Name AllowTelemetry -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).AllowTelemetry; $adId = (Get-ItemProperty 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\AdvertisingInfo' -Name Enabled -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).Enabled; $diag = (Get-Service DiagTrack).Status; if($telemetry -eq 0 -and $adId -eq 0 -and $diag -eq 'Stopped') { 'OK: Datenschutz-Haertung erfolgreich' } else { 'WARNUNG: Nicht alle Einstellungen korrekt gesetzt' } }

steps.label: Provisioned AppX-Pakete auflisten...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-AppxProvisionedPackage -Online | Where-Object { $_.DisplayName -match 'BubbleWitch|CandyCrush|Disney|Facebook|Flipboard|Minecraft|Netflix|Spotify|Twitter|TikTok|Solitaire|MarchOf|Bing|Phone|Zune|3DBuilder|3DViewer|MixedReality|People|Print3D|SkypeApp|Xbox' } | Select-Object DisplayName }

steps.label: Bekannte Bloatware entfernen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $bloatApps = @('*BubbleWitch*','*CandyCrush*','*Disney*','*Facebook*','*Flipboard*','*Minecraft*','*Netflix*','*Spotify*','*Twitter*','*TikTok*','*Solitaire*','*MarchOf*','*3DBuilder*','*3DViewer*','*MixedReality*','*People*','*Print3D*','*SkypeApp*','*Phone*','*Zune*'); foreach($app in $bloatApps) { Get-AppxPackage -AllUsers $app -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Remove-AppxPackage -AllUsers -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-AppxProvisionedPackage -Online | Where-Object { $_.DisplayName -like $app } | Remove-AppxProvisionedPackage -Online -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }

steps.label: ContentDeliveryManager deaktivieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $cdm = 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\ContentDeliveryManager'; Set-ItemProperty -Path $cdm -Name SilentInstalledAppsEnabled -Value 0 -Type DWord -Force; Set-ItemProperty -Path $cdm -Name PreInstalledAppsEnabled -Value 0 -Type DWord -Force; Set-ItemProperty -Path $cdm -Name OemPreInstalledAppsEnabled -Value 0 -Type DWord -Force; Set-ItemProperty -Path $cdm -Name ContentDeliveryAllowed -Value 0 -Type DWord -Force; Set-ItemProperty -Path $cdm -Name SubscribedContentEnabled -Value 0 -Type DWord -Force }

steps.label: Consumer Features deaktivieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { New-Item -Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\CloudContent' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Out-Null; Set-ItemProperty -Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\CloudContent' -Name DisableWindowsConsumerFeatures -Value 1 -Type DWord -Force }

steps.label: Game DVR deaktivieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Set-ItemProperty -Path 'HKCU:\System\GameConfigStore' -Name GameDVR_Enabled -Value 0 -Type DWord -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; New-Item -Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\GameDVR' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Out-Null; Set-ItemProperty -Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\GameDVR' -Name AllowGameDVR -Value 0 -Type DWord -Force }

steps.label: Bloatware-Entfernung verifizieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $remaining = Get-AppxPackage -AllUsers | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'BubbleWitch|CandyCrush|Disney|Facebook|Flipboard|Minecraft|Netflix|Spotify|Twitter|TikTok' } | Measure-Object; $cdm = (Get-ItemProperty 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\ContentDeliveryManager' -Name SilentInstalledAppsEnabled -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).SilentInstalledAppsEnabled; if($remaining.Count -eq 0 -and $cdm -eq 0) { 'OK: Bloatware entfernt und automatische Installation deaktiviert' } else { 'WARNUNG: Noch ' + $remaining.Count + ' Bloatware-Apps vorhanden' } }

steps.label: Neustart-Ursachen ermitteln...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $reasons = @(); if(Test-Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Component Based Servicing\RebootPending') { $reasons += 'CBS (Component Based Servicing)' }; if(Test-Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\WindowsUpdate\Auto Update\RebootRequired') { $reasons += 'Windows Update' }; if(Get-ItemProperty 'HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Session Manager' -Name PendingFileRenameOperations -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { $reasons += 'Pending File Rename' }; $uptime = (Get-Date) - (Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem).LastBootUpTime; [PSCustomObject]@{Reasons=$reasons -join ', '; UptimeDays=$uptime.Days; UptimeHours=$uptime.Hours} }

steps.label: Benutzer informieren...
steps.message: IT-Wartung: Ihr PC muss in 5 Minuten neu gestartet werden. Bitte speichern Sie alle offenen Dokumente.

steps.label: Ausstehende Updates pruefen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { if(Test-Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\WindowsUpdate\Auto Update\RebootRequired') { Get-HotFix | Sort-Object InstalledOn -Descending | Select-Object -First 3 HotFixID, Description, InstalledOn } else { 'Kein Update-Neustart erforderlich' } }

steps.label: 5-Minuten-Warnung senden...
steps.message: IT-Wartung: Neustart in 5 Minuten. Bitte speichern Sie JETZT alle Arbeiten!

steps.label: PC neustarten...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Restart-Computer -Force }

steps.label: Neustart verifizieren...
steps.command: $result = Test-Connection '{hostname}' -Count 3 -Quiet; if($result) { $uptime = Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { ((Get-Date) - (Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem).LastBootUpTime).TotalMinutes }; if($uptime -lt 5) { 'OK: PC erfolgreich neu gestartet (Uptime: ' + [math]::Round($uptime,1) + ' Minuten)' } else { 'WARNUNG: PC erreichbar aber Uptime hoch' } } else { 'WARNUNG: PC noch nicht erreichbar' }

steps.label: Bereits installierte Software pruefen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-ItemProperty 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\*','HKLM:\SOFTWARE\WOW6432Node\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\*' | Where-Object { $_.DisplayName } | Select-Object DisplayName, DisplayVersion | Sort-Object DisplayName }

steps.label: Winget Verfuegbarkeit pruefen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { try { $ver = winget --version 2>$null; 'Winget Version: ' + $ver } catch { 'Winget nicht verfuegbar' } }

steps.label: Software via Winget installieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { winget install '{packageId}' --accept-package-agreements --accept-source-agreements --silent 2>&1 }

steps.label: Installation verifizieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $installed = Get-ItemProperty 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\*','HKLM:\SOFTWARE\WOW6432Node\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\*' | Where-Object { $_.DisplayName -like '*{appName}*' }; if($installed) { 'OK: ' + $installed.DisplayName + ' v' + $installed.DisplayVersion + ' installiert' } else { 'WARNUNG: Software nicht in der Programmliste gefunden' } }

steps.label: Schriftart auf Ziel pruefen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-ChildItem 'C:\Windows\Fonts' -Filter '{fontFile}' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

steps.label: Schriftart von Share kopieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Copy-Item '\\fileserver\Fonts$\{fontFile}' 'C:\Windows\Fonts\{fontFile}' -Force }

steps.label: Schriftart in Registry registrieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { New-ItemProperty -Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Fonts' -Name '{fontName} (TrueType)' -Value '{fontFile}' -PropertyType String -Force }

steps.label: Schriftart-Installation verifizieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $fontExists = Test-Path "C:\Windows\Fonts\{fontFile}"; $regEntry = Get-ItemProperty 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Fonts' -Name '{fontName} (TrueType)' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if($fontExists -and $regEntry) { 'OK: Schriftart {fontName} erfolgreich installiert' } else { 'WARNUNG: Schriftart-Installation unvollstaendig' } }

steps.label: Signatur-Ordner suchen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $users = Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users' -Directory -Exclude 'Public','Default*'; foreach($u in $users) { $sigPath = "$($u.FullName)\AppData\Roaming\Microsoft\Signatures"; [PSCustomObject]@{User=$u.Name; SigPath=$sigPath; Exists=Test-Path $sigPath; Files=(Get-ChildItem $sigPath -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object).Count} } }

steps.label: Signatur-Dateien kopieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $users = Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users' -Directory -Exclude 'Public','Default*'; foreach($u in $users) { $sigPath = "$($u.FullName)\AppData\Roaming\Microsoft\Signatures"; New-Item -Path $sigPath -ItemType Directory -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Out-Null; Copy-Item '\\fileserver\Signatures$\*' $sigPath -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }

steps.label: Standard-Signatur in Registry setzen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $profiles = Get-ChildItem 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Office\16.0\Outlook\Profiles' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; foreach($p in $profiles) { $accts = Get-ChildItem "$($p.PSPath)\9375CFF0413111d3B88A00104B2A6676" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; foreach($a in $accts) { Set-ItemProperty -Path $a.PSPath -Name 'New Signature' -Value '{signatureName}' -Type String -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Set-ItemProperty -Path $a.PSPath -Name 'Reply-Forward Signature' -Value '{signatureName}' -Type String -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } }

steps.label: Signatur-Verteilung verifizieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $users = Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users' -Directory -Exclude 'Public','Default*'; $ok = 0; $total = 0; foreach($u in $users) { $total++; $sigPath = "$($u.FullName)\AppData\Roaming\Microsoft\Signatures"; if((Get-ChildItem $sigPath -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object).Count -gt 0) { $ok++ } }; if($ok -eq $total) { 'OK: Signatur bei ' + $ok + '/' + $total + ' Benutzern verteilt' } else { 'WARNUNG: Signatur nur bei ' + $ok + '/' + $total + ' Benutzern' } }

steps.label: Systemwiederherstellung pruefen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $sr = Get-ItemProperty 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\SystemRestore' -Name RPSessionInterval -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $enabled = (Get-ComputerRestorePoint -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) -ne $null; [PSCustomObject]@{Enabled=$enabled; RPInterval=$sr.RPSessionInterval} }

steps.label: Systemwiederherstellung aktivieren (falls noetig)...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Enable-ComputerRestore -Drive 'C:\' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Set-ItemProperty 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\SystemRestore' -Name RPSessionInterval -Value 1 -Type DWord -Force }

steps.label: Wiederherstellungspunkt erstellen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Checkpoint-Computer -Description 'IT Admin Tool - Manueller Wiederherstellungspunkt' -RestorePointType MODIFY_SETTINGS }

steps.label: Wiederherstellungspunkt verifizieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $latest = Get-ComputerRestorePoint | Sort-Object CreationTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1; if($latest -and $latest.Description -like '*IT Admin Tool*') { 'OK: Wiederherstellungspunkt erstellt am ' + $latest.CreationTime } else { 'WARNUNG: Wiederherstellungspunkt konnte nicht verifiziert werden' } }

steps.label: Verfuegbare Schattenkopien auflisten...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { vssadmin list shadows | Select-String 'Shadow Copy Volume|Creation Time|Shadow Copy ID' }

steps.label: Schattenkopie mounten...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $shadow = (Get-CimInstance Win32_ShadowCopy | Sort-Object InstallDate -Descending | Select-Object -First 1); $link = 'C:\ShadowMount'; cmd /c mklink /d $link ($shadow.DeviceObject + '\') 2>$null; 'Schattenkopie gemountet unter ' + $link }

steps.label: Datei aus Schattenkopie kopieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Copy-Item 'C:\ShadowMount\{filePath}' '{targetPath}' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

steps.label: Schattenkopie unmounten...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { cmd /c rmdir 'C:\ShadowMount' 2>$null }

steps.label: Wiederherstellung verifizieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { if(Test-Path '{targetPath}') { $file = Get-Item '{targetPath}'; 'OK: Datei wiederhergestellt - ' + $file.Name + ' (' + [math]::Round($file.Length/1KB,1) + ' KB)' } else { 'WARNUNG: Datei konnte nicht wiederhergestellt werden' } }

steps.label: WLAN-Profile auflisten...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { netsh wlan show profiles }

steps.label: Benutzer informieren...
steps.message: IT-Wartung: WLAN wird zurueckgesetzt. Die WLAN-Verbindung wird kurzzeitig unterbrochen.

steps.label: Alle WLAN-Profile loeschen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { netsh wlan delete profile name=* }

steps.label: WLAN-Adapter zuruecksetzen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-NetAdapter | Where-Object { $_.InterfaceDescription -like '*Wi-Fi*' -or $_.InterfaceDescription -like '*Wireless*' -or $_.Name -like '*WLAN*' } | Restart-NetAdapter -Confirm:$false }

steps.label: Benutzer ueber Abschluss informieren...
steps.message: IT-Wartung: WLAN wurde zurueckgesetzt. Bitte verbinden Sie sich erneut mit dem gewuenschten Netzwerk.

steps.label: Icon-Cache loeschen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $users = Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users' -Directory -Exclude 'Public','Default*'; foreach($u in $users) { Remove-Item "$($u.FullName)\AppData\Local\IconCache.db" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item "$($u.FullName)\AppData\Local\Microsoft\Windows\Explorer\iconcache*" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }

steps.label: Thumbnail-Cache loeschen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $users = Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users' -Directory -Exclude 'Public','Default*'; foreach($u in $users) { Remove-Item "$($u.FullName)\AppData\Local\Microsoft\Windows\Explorer\thumbcache*" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }

steps.label: Explorer neustarten...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Stop-Process -Name explorer -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Start-Process explorer }

steps.label: Schnellzugriff zuruecksetzen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $users = Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users' -Directory -Exclude 'Public','Default*'; foreach($u in $users) { Remove-Item "$($u.FullName)\AppData\Roaming\Microsoft\Windows\Recent\AutomaticDestinations\*" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item "$($u.FullName)\AppData\Roaming\Microsoft\Windows\Recent\CustomDestinations\*" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }

steps.label: Explorer-Reparatur verifizieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $explorer = Get-Process explorer -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if($explorer) { 'OK: Explorer laeuft (PID: ' + $explorer.Id + ', Icon/Thumbnail-Cache geleert)' } else { 'WARNUNG: Explorer-Prozess nicht gefunden' } }

steps.label: Aktuelle Einstellungen pruefen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $dpi = (Get-ItemProperty 'HKCU:\Control Panel\Desktop\WindowMetrics' -Name AppliedDPI -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).AppliedDPI; $cursor = (Get-ItemProperty 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Accessibility' -Name CursorSize -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).CursorSize; $textScale = (Get-ItemProperty 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Accessibility' -Name TextScaleFactor -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).TextScaleFactor; $contrast = (Get-ItemProperty 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Themes\Personalize' -Name AppsUseLightTheme -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).AppsUseLightTheme; [PSCustomObject]@{DPI=$dpi; CursorSize=$cursor; TextScale=$textScale; LightTheme=$contrast} }

steps.label: DPI und Textgroesse anpassen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Set-ItemProperty -Path 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Accessibility' -Name TextScaleFactor -Value {textScale} -Type DWord -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

steps.label: Cursorgroesse anpassen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Set-ItemProperty -Path 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Accessibility' -Name CursorSize -Value {cursorSize} -Type DWord -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

steps.label: Aenderungen verifizieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $textScale = (Get-ItemProperty 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Accessibility' -Name TextScaleFactor -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).TextScaleFactor; $cursor = (Get-ItemProperty 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Accessibility' -Name CursorSize -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).CursorSize; 'OK: TextScale=' + $textScale + ', CursorSize=' + $cursor }

steps.label: BitLocker-Status pruefen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-BitLockerVolume | Select-Object MountPoint, VolumeStatus, ProtectionStatus, LockStatus, EncryptionMethod, KeyProtector }

steps.label: Recovery-Key aus AD abrufen...
steps.command: try { $computer = Get-ADComputer '{hostname}'; $keys = Get-ADObject -Filter { objectClass -eq 'msFVE-RecoveryInformation' } -SearchBase $computer.DistinguishedName -Properties 'msFVE-RecoveryPassword'; $keys | ForEach-Object { [PSCustomObject]@{Date=$_.Name.Split('{')[0].Trim(); RecoveryKey=$_.'msFVE-RecoveryPassword'} } } catch { 'AD-Abfrage fehlgeschlagen: ' + $_.Exception.Message }

steps.label: Laufwerk entsperren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Unlock-BitLocker -MountPoint '{drive}' -RecoveryPassword '{recoveryKey}' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

steps.label: Entsperrung verifizieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $vol = Get-BitLockerVolume -MountPoint '{drive}'; if($vol.LockStatus -eq 'Unlocked') { 'OK: Laufwerk {drive} erfolgreich entsperrt' } else { 'WARNUNG: Laufwerk {drive} noch gesperrt - Status: ' + $vol.LockStatus } }

steps.label: USBSTOR-Status pruefen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $start = (Get-ItemProperty 'HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\USBSTOR' -Name Start).Start; $status = if($start -eq 3) { 'Erlaubt' } elseif($start -eq 4) { 'Blockiert' } else { 'Unbekannt' }; [PSCustomObject]@{StartValue=$start; Status=$status} }

steps.label: USBSTOR Registry-Wert aendern...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $current = (Get-ItemProperty 'HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\USBSTOR' -Name Start).Start; $new = if($current -eq 3) { 4 } else { 3 }; Set-ItemProperty -Path 'HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\USBSTOR' -Name Start -Value $new -Type DWord -Force; $status = if($new -eq 3) { 'Erlaubt' } else { 'Blockiert' }; 'USB-Speicher Status geaendert auf: ' + $status }

steps.label: USBSTOR-Aenderung verifizieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $start = (Get-ItemProperty 'HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\USBSTOR' -Name Start).Start; $status = if($start -eq 3) { 'Erlaubt' } elseif($start -eq 4) { 'Blockiert' } else { 'Unbekannt' }; 'OK: USB-Speicher ist jetzt ' + $status + ' (Start=' + $start + ')' }

steps.label: Kuerzliche Updates auflisten...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-HotFix | Sort-Object InstalledOn -Descending | Select-Object -First 10 HotFixID, Description, InstalledOn | Format-Table }

steps.label: Benutzer informieren...
steps.message: IT-Wartung: Ein problematisches Windows Update wird deinstalliert. Bitte speichern Sie Ihre Arbeit.

steps.label: Update deinstallieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { wusa /uninstall /kb:{kbNumber} /quiet /norestart 2>&1 }

steps.label: Deinstallation verifizieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $still = Get-HotFix -Id 'KB{kbNumber}' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if(!$still) { 'OK: Update KB{kbNumber} erfolgreich deinstalliert' } else { 'WARNUNG: Update KB{kbNumber} noch vorhanden' } }

steps.label: Neustart erforderlich pruefen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $pending = Test-Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Component Based Servicing\RebootPending'; if($pending) { 'Neustart erforderlich nach Update-Deinstallation' } else { 'Kein Neustart erforderlich' } }

steps.label: Assigned Access pruefen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-LocalUser | Where-Object { $_.Name -like '*kiosk*' } | Select-Object Name, Enabled; Get-ItemProperty 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\AssignedAccessConfiguration' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

steps.label: Kiosk-Benutzer erstellen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $password = ConvertTo-SecureString '{kioskPassword}' -AsPlainText -Force; New-LocalUser -Name 'KioskUser' -Password $password -Description 'Kiosk Modus Benutzer' -PasswordNeverExpires -UserMayNotChangePassword -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Add-LocalGroupMember -Group 'Users' -Member 'KioskUser' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

steps.label: Assigned Access konfigurieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Set-AssignedAccess -UserName 'KioskUser' -AppName '{kioskApp}' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

steps.label: Kiosk-Einrichtung verifizieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $user = Get-LocalUser 'KioskUser' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $aa = Get-ItemProperty 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\AssignedAccessConfiguration' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if($user -and $user.Enabled) { 'OK: Kiosk-Benutzer erstellt und Assigned Access konfiguriert' } else { 'WARNUNG: Kiosk-Einrichtung unvollstaendig' } }

steps.label: Druckertreiber analysieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Get-PrinterDriver | Select-Object Name, MajorVersion, PrinterEnvironment, Manufacturer | Format-Table; Get-Printer | Select-Object Name, DriverName, PortName, PrinterStatus | Format-Table }

steps.label: Druckspooler stoppen und bereinigen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Stop-Service Spooler -Force; Remove-Item 'C:\Windows\System32\spool\PRINTERS\*' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

steps.label: Alten Treiber entfernen...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Remove-PrinterDriver -Name '{oldDriverName}' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

steps.label: Korrekten Treiber installieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Add-PrinterDriver -Name '{newDriverName}' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Set-Printer -Name '{printerName}' -DriverName '{newDriverName}' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

steps.label: Druckspooler starten und Testseite...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { Start-Service Spooler; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $printer = Get-CimInstance Win32_Printer | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq '{printerName}' }; $printer | Invoke-CimMethod -MethodName PrintTestPage -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

steps.label: Treiber-Reparatur verifizieren...
steps.command: Invoke-Command -ComputerName '{hostname}' -ScriptBlock { $spooler = Get-Service Spooler; $printer = Get-Printer -Name '{printerName}' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $spoolFiles = (Get-ChildItem 'C:\Windows\System32\spool\PRINTERS' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object).Count; if($spooler.Status -eq 'Running' -and $printer -and $printer.PrinterStatus -ne 'Error') { 'OK: Druckertreiber repariert - Spooler laeuft, Drucker bereit' } else { 'WARNUNG: Drucker-Status: ' + $printer.PrinterStatus } }
